github._comment: Names below are fetched live from GitHub API. Add/remove repo names freely. Set enabled=false to skip GitHub entirely.

featured.title: LLM-Powered DevSecOps Assistant
featured.summary: An AI assistant that reviews IaC pull requests, flags security drift, and auto-suggests Terraform fixes via OpenAI.
featured.description: Integrates with GitHub Actions to scan Terraform plans, runs policy checks, and posts inline review comments. Cuts manual review time on standard infra changes by ~60%.

featured.title: Secure AWS Landing Zone (Terraform)
featured.summary: Multi-account AWS baseline with guardrails, centralised logging, and least-privilege IAM — provisioned via reusable Terraform modules.
featured.description: Implements CIS-aligned controls, SCPs, GuardDuty, and a logging account pattern. Ships as a module library so new environments boot in under an hour.

featured.title: Container Hardening Pipeline
featured.summary: Jenkins + Trivy + Cosign pipeline that builds, scans, signs, and promotes container images across environments.
featured.description: Stops vulnerable images at build time, signs verified artefacts, and enforces admission policies in Kubernetes via Kyverno.

featured.title: HackTheBox Profile
featured.summary: Active CTF practice — hands-on penetration testing across web, network, and Active Directory paths.
featured.description: Continuous offensive-security practice to keep blue-team intuition sharp. Focused on chained web exploits and AD enumeration.

more.title: BehindO — Tamil Tech Tutorials
more.summary: Android app delivering tech education in Tamil, distributed via the Play Store.

more.title: Think Different — Tech Blog
more.summary: Long-running blog covering Windows/Linux/Android tips and deep-dives.
